JANKTHESPIRE-CRUMBLING_STRIKE.title: Crumbling Strike
JANKTHESPIRE-CRUMBLING_STRIKE.descriptio: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Permanently decrease this card's damage by {Decrease:diff()}.
JANKTHESPIRE-ALL_IN.title: All In
JANKTHESPIRE-ALL_IN.description: Discard Hand. Next turn gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and lose {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold] for each card discarded.
